notes: The optimized decoder raises the tested batch-32 single-device prefill floor from 4096 to 8192 tokens by using BFP8 KV caches and bounded internal projection/MLP chunks. The value is an evidence-backed supported floor, not a claim that 8193 is the exact boundary. A 16384-token probe reaches a hard device-DRAM allocation failure. The reduction from the HF-advertised context is a physical single-device capacity limit, not a public alignment or convenience cap; multichip work may extend it.

capacity_evidence.hardware: Blackhole p300c, one device (1x1 mesh), eight DRAM banks
capacity_evidence.workload: one optimized dense decoder layer, batch 32, BF16 activations, BFP4 projection weights, BFP8 KV caches, internal chunks of at most 640 rows

advertised_context_impossibility.note: At batch 32 and sequence 40960, the required BF16 packed-QKV output plus one BF16 hidden tensor already total 40265318400 bytes, exceeding all device DRAM before KV caches, weights, attention output, allocator fragmentation, or other live tensors.

decode_trace_state.components: two 32x128 BF16 RoPE tiles (8192 bytes each), 32 uint32 RoPE lookup indices (128 bytes), and 32 int32 cache-update indices (128 bytes)
decode_trace_state.lifecycle: fixed-address index buffers refreshed by host-to-device writes, then embedding lands in preallocated RoPE outputs before replay; no device allocation and no per-position retention while a trace is live
decode_trace_state.stack_note: The position inputs are model-independent and may be shared by a future layer stack; even if separately owned by all 64 layers, payload is bounded at 1064960 bytes.

row_major_lookup_tables.note: Two bounded 8192x128 BF16 lookup tables enable allocation-free traced position refresh. They are model-independent and shareable by a future layer stack; the single-layer capacity probes include one copy.

source_precision_policy.qkv_o_gate_up_down_weights: BFLOAT8_B after load-time fusion or transposition

translation.functional_precision_policy: All weights and activations use BFLOAT16 for the correctness-first stage; source BFLOAT8_B weight casts are intentionally not retained.

optimized_precision_policy.decode_residual: L1 width-sharded across 40 cores; down projection uses 32 cores
